---
title: "Programming practice"
---

## Labs

### Lab 1: Env setup; command-line app

[Lab 1](./2026/lab1.qmd)

### Lab 2: Block processor
[Lab 2](./2026/lab2.qmd)

### Lab 3: SQL part 1
[Lab 3](./2026/lab3.qmd)

### Lab 4: SQL part 2
[Lab 4](./2026/lab4.qmd)

### Lab 5: SQL part 3
[Lab 5](./2026/lab5.qmd)

### Lab 6: Validation and testing
[Lab 6](./2026/lab6.qmd)

### Lab 7: Documentation: Markdown and Mermaid
[Lab 7](./2026/lab7.qmd)

## Assessment

- 2 points max for each lesson
- 4 points max for each lab (if submitted later than 2 weeks deadline, max points is 2)

Hence, max points to score during semester is $(2+4)*15 = 90$.
